spec_match.rationale: The page now loads the feed inside real iframes from a server route that sends Supports-Responsive-Sizing: 1, with the responsive iframe using allow-responsive-sizing.

interactive.rationale: Users add and reset posts inside the embedded feed while metrics show fixed iframe overflow and fallback resize events.

blurb_alignment.rationale: The dynamic feed still demonstrates the scrolling problem described by the feature index.

edge_cases.rationale: Compares a fixed-height iframe to a responsive iframe, detects native support, verifies the child header, and labels fallback mode in older browsers.

design_system.rationale: Uses shared showcase tokens for the parent UI and the server-rendered child fixture links the shared stylesheet.

runtime_evidence.rationale: Fresh Chrome DevTools MCP v152 sweep loaded the copied concept, exercised every detected control, found named controls, and reported no post-triage runtime/action failure.

conformance.rationale: A v152 suite now carries the same feature-ID/spec contract without modifying the immutable source-milestone suite.

summary: The simulated feed resize was replaced with real iframe documents backed by the shared responsive iframe route and conditional fallback behavior.
